Item Class: Gloves
Rarity: Rare
Woe Clutches
Runeforged War Wraps
--------
Quality: +20% (augmented)
Evasion Rating: 91 (augmented)
Energy Shield: 28 (augmented)
Runic Ward: 34 (augmented)
--------
Requires: Level 65, 44 Dex, 44 Int
--------
Sockets: S S
--------
Item Level: 81
--------
8% increased Attack Speed (rune)
Can roll Marksman modifiers (rune)
--------
{ Prefix Modifier "Kolr's" (Tier: 1) — Damage }
37(31-40)% increased Projectile Damage
{ Desecrated Prefix Modifier "Electrocuting" (Tier: 1) — Damage, Elemental, Lightning, Attack }
Adds 2(1-4) to 60(60-71) Lightning damage to Attacks
{ Prefix Modifier "Razor-sharp" (Tier: 3) — Damage, Physical, Attack }
Adds 10(7-11) to 16(14-20) Physical Damage to Attacks
{ Suffix Modifier "of the Hunt" (Tier: 1) }
+62(51-66)% Surpassing chance to fire an additional Projectile
{ Suffix Modifier "of the Lightning" (Tier: 2) — Elemental, Lightning, Resistance }
+36(36-40)% to Lightning Resistance
{ Crafted Suffix Modifier "of Fury" (Tier: 2) — Damage, Critical }
27(25-29)% increased Critical Damage Bonus
